issues_encountered: Python 提取 HTML 后整页落在单行 L1：subagent 用 byte offset 作为辅助锚点；Brief 阶段如升级，需按事件分层重新切句生成行号锚点

cross_check_anchors.verbatim: Hooks are user-defined shell commands, HTTP endpoints, or LLM prompts that execute automatically at specific points in Claude Code's lifecycle
Enterprise administrators can use allowManagedHooksOnly to block user, project, and plugin hooks
Hooks run without a controlling terminal, so writing escape sequences directly to /dev/tty fails. Instead, return the escape sequence in the terminalSequence field
